title: Expense Tracker
description: A full stack finance dashboard built with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Track expenses, income, and assets with real-time charts and stats.
bullets: Full-stack personal finance dashboard for tracking expenses, income, and assets with complete CRUD functionality
Real-time analytics dashboard with net worth, savings rate, time-based filtering, recurring entries, and detailed stat breakdowns
Data visualizations including 7-day income vs spending line chart, category breakdowns, and recent activity feed with status tagging

title: This Website
description: Personal portfolio rebuilt from scratch with a modern stack.
bullets: Deployed on Vercel with automatic CI/CD on every push

title: Digital Classifier
description: Digit Classifier — PyTorch, ONNX, React, Vercel Trained a CNN from scratch on 60k images (99.2% accuracy). Exported to ONNX and deployed in the browser — users draw a digit and get a real-time prediction with confidence scores.
bullets: Developed and trained a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) in PyTorch on the MNIST dataset, achieving 99.2% test accuracy on 60,000+ training images
Built an interactive React application where users can draw handwritten digits and receive real-time predictions with confidence scores
Deployed the full application on Vercel, enabling fast, accessible AI-powered digit recognition directly in the browser

title: Mercari Clone
description: Mercari-inspired marketplace app built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Browse listings, view item details, and list items for sale.
bullets: Implemented product browsing, item detail pages, and responsive UI components for a seamless user experience
Built item listing functionality allowing users to create and manage products for sale
